task_name: add Mistral Instruct v3 chat template

plan_metrics.plan_content:
Here's the complete implementation plan:

---

## Plan: `mistral-instruct-v3` Chat Template Handler

### What's happening

The Mistral Instruct v0.3 format (`[INST]/[/INST]` markers, system → first user turn, `</s>` after assistant) currently falls through to the auto-parser. The new handler covers both the basic v0.3 format **and** Mistral Nemo (same `[INST]` structure plus `[TOOL_CALLS][{name, arguments, id}]` tool calls). Detection checks for `[INST]`+`[/INST]` presence and `[SYSTEM_PROMPT]`+`[ARGS]` absence, which cleanly excludes Ministral-3, Devstral, and Mistral Small 3.2.

### 4 changes, in order

**1. New file — `models/templates/mistralai-Mistral-7B-Instruct-v0.3.jinja`**  
A minimal Jinja template: system message prepended to first `[INST]` turn with `\n\n`, no tool-call tokens. Needed by the test infrastructure.

**2. `common/chat.cpp` lines 1517–1518** — Insert the handler function `common_chat_params_init_mistral_instruct_v3`:
- Content-only path: `p.literal(generation_prompt) + p.content(p.rest())`
- Tool-call path: `standard_json_tools("[TOOL_CALLS][", "]", ..., name_key="name", args_key="arguments", call_id_key="id", parameters_order={"name","arguments","id"})` + content before `[TOOL_CALLS]`
- Grammar trigger: `COMMON_GRAMMAR_TRIGGER_TYPE_WORD, "[TOOL_CALLS]"`

**3. `common/chat.cpp` lines 1688–1690** — Insert detection into `common_chat_try_specialized_template`, just before `return std::nullopt`:
```cpp
if (src.find("[INST]") != std::string::npos &&
    src.find("[/INST]") != std::string::npos &&
    src.find("[SYSTEM_PROMPT]") == std::string::npos &&
    src.find("[ARGS]") == std::string::npos) {
    LOG_DBG("Using specialized template: Mistral Instruct v3/Nemo\n");
    return common_chat_params_init_mistral_instruct_v3(tmpl, params);
}
```

**4. `tests/test-chat.cpp` after line 3148** — One new test block for the v0.3 template (content-only, with `expect_reconstruction()`). The two existing Nemo test cases at lines 3139–3148 automatically become regression tests for the new handler once the detection fires for Nemo.

### Verification
```bash
cmake -B build -DLLAMA_BUILD_TESTS=ON && cmake --build build --parallel --target test-chat
./build/bin/test-chat --template Mistral-7B-Instruct-v0.3   # new template
./build/bin/test-chat --template Mistral-Nemo               # regression
./build/bin/test-chat                                        # full suite
```
